component.name: WebBrowser

Label.text: Web browser ready. Enter a video URL to play.
OK: Play/Pause | UP/DOWN: Browse | LEFT: Bookmarks | RIGHT: URL Input | BACK: Menu

component.script:
function init() m.currentUrl = m.top.findNode("currentUrl") m.pageTitle = m.top.findNode("pageTitle") m.isLoading = m.top.findNode("isLoading") m.videoPlayer = m.top.findNode("videoPlayer") m.contentLabel = m.top.findNode("contentLabel") m.urlDisplay = m.top.findNode("urlDisplay") m.loadingLabel = m.top.findNode("loadingLabel") m.bookmarksList = m.top.findNode("bookmarksList") m.bookmarks = [] m.history = [] m.currentInput = "" m.showBookmarks = false m.top.observeField("currentUrl", m.port) m.videoPlayer.observeField("state", m.port) loadBookmarks() updateBookmarksList() end function
function onPortMessage() as void msg = wait(0, m.port) if type(msg) = "roSGNodeEvent" field = msg.getField() if field = "currentUrl" loadContent(m.currentUrl.value) else if field = "state" and msg.getNode().id = "videoPlayer" handleVideoStateChange(m.videoPlayer.state) end if end if end function
function loadContent(url as String) as void if url = "" then return if not isValidUrl(url) showError("Invalid URL format") return end if m.isLoading.value = true m.loadingLabel.visible = true m.contentLabel.text = "Loading content..." m.urlDisplay.text = url if isVideoUrl(url) playVideo(url) else fetchWebContent(url) end if end function
function isValidUrl(url as String) as Boolean return url.left(7) = "http://" or url.left(8) = "https://" end function
function isVideoUrl(url as String) as Boolean videoExtensions = [".mp4", ".mkv", ".m3u8", ".mpd", ".webm", ".avi", ".mov"] lowerUrl = lcase(url) for each ext in videoExtensions if lowerUrl.instr(ext) > 0 return true end for end for streamingDomains = ["youtube.com", "vimeo.com", "dailymotion.com", "twitch.tv", "hulu.com"] for each domain in streamingDomains if lowerUrl.instr(domain) > 0 return true end for end for return false end function
function playVideo(url as String) as void m.videoPlayer.visible = true m.contentLabel.visible = false m.bookmarksList.visible = false m.videoPlayer.content = createVideoContent(url) m.videoPlayer.control = "play" m.videoPlayer.setFocus(true) addToHistory(url) m.isLoading.value = false m.loadingLabel.visible = false end function
function createVideoContent(url as String) as Object content = createObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") content.url = url content.title = m.pageTitle.value content.streamFormat = "auto" return content end function
function fetchWebContent(url as String) as void http = createObject("roUrlTransfer") http.setUrl(url) http.setCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") http.initClientCertificates() http.setConnectTimeout(10) http.setReadTimeout(10) http.addHeader("User-Agent", "Roku/9.0") response = http.getToString() if response <> invalid and response <> "" videoSources = extractVideoSources(response, url) if videoSources.count() > 0 playVideo(videoSources[0]) else displayWebContent(response, url) end if else showError("Failed to load content from URL") end if m.isLoading.value = false m.loadingLabel.visible = false end function
function extractVideoSources(html as String, baseUrl as String) as Object sources = [] videoStart = 0 while true videoStart = html.instr(videoStart, "<video") if videoStart = 0 then exit while sourceStart = html.instr(videoStart, "<source") if sourceStart > videoStart hrefStart = html.instr(sourceStart, "src=") if hrefStart > sourceStart hrefStart += 5 quoteEnd = html.instr(hrefStart, """) if quoteEnd > hrefStart src = html.mid(hrefStart, quoteEnd - hrefStart) if src <> "" and src.left(1) <> "<" sources.push(resolveUrl(src, baseUrl)) end if end if end if end if videoStart += 6 end while iframeStart = 0 while true iframeStart = html.instr(iframeStart, "<iframe") if iframeStart = 0 then exit while srcStart = html.instr(iframeStart, "src=") if srcStart > iframeStart srcStart += 5 quoteEnd = html.instr(srcStart, """) if quoteEnd > srcStart src = html.mid(srcStart, quoteEnd - srcStart) if src <> "" and src.left(1) <> "<" sources.push(resolveUrl(src, baseUrl)) end if end if end if iframeStart += 7 end while return sources end function
function resolveUrl(url as String, baseUrl as String) as String if url.left(1) = "/" baseUrlNoPath = baseUrl protocolEnd = baseUrl.instr("://") if protocolEnd > 0 slashPos = baseUrl.instr(protocolEnd + 3, "/") if slashPos > 0 baseUrlNoPath = baseUrl.left(slashPos) end if end if return baseUrlNoPath + url else if url.left(4) <> "http" baseUrlNoPath = baseUrl lastSlash = baseUrl.instr(0, "/") while true nextSlash = baseUrl.instr(lastSlash + 1, "/") if nextSlash = 0 then exit while lastSlash = nextSlash end while return baseUrl.left(lastSlash) + url end if return url end function
function displayWebContent(html as String, url as String) as void m.videoPlayer.visible = false m.contentLabel.visible = true m.bookmarksList.visible = false titleStart = html.instr("<title>") if titleStart > 0 titleStart += 7 titleEnd = html.instr(titleStart, "</title>") if titleEnd > titleStart m.pageTitle.value = html.mid(titleStart, titleEnd - titleStart) end if end if text = stripHtmlTags(html) text = text.left(500) + "..." m.contentLabel.text = text addToHistory(url) end function
function stripHtmlTags(html as String) as String result = "" inTag = false for i = 0 to html.len() - 1 char = html.mid(i, 1) if char = "<" inTag = true else if char = "> inTag = false else if not inTag result = result + char end if end for result = result.replace(" ", " ") result = result.replace(""", "\"") result = result.replace("&", "&") return result end function
function addToHistory(url as String) as void if m.history.count() > 0 and m.history[m.history.count() - 1] = url return end if m.history.push(url) if m.history.count() > 50 m.history.shift() end if saveHistory() end function
function saveHistory() as void registry = createObject("roRegistry") historyStr = "" for each url in m.history historyStr = historyStr + url + "|" end for registry.write("browser_history", historyStr) registry.flush() end function
function loadHistory() as void registry = createObject("roRegistry") historyStr = registry.read("browser_history") if historyStr <> invalid m.history = historyStr.split("|") end if end function
function addBookmark(url as String, title as String) as void bookmark = { url: url, title: title } m.bookmarks.push(bookmark) saveBookmarks() updateBookmarksList() end function
function saveBookmarks() as void registry = createObject("roRegistry") bookmarkStr = "" for each bookmark in m.bookmarks bookmarkStr = bookmarkStr + bookmark.title +":::" + bookmark.url + "|" end for registry.write("bookmarks", bookmarkStr) registry.flush() end function
function loadBookmarks() as void registry = createObject("roRegistry") bookmarkStr = registry.read("bookmarks") if bookmarkStr <> invalid items = bookmarkStr.split("|") for each item in items if item <> "" parts = item.split(":::") if parts.count() = 2 bookmark = { title: parts[0], url: parts[1] } m.bookmarks.push(bookmark) end if end if end for end if end function
function updateBookmarksList() as void items = [] for each bookmark in m.bookmarks item = { title: bookmark.title, description: bookmark.url } items.push(item) end for m.bookmarksList.content = createListContent(items) end function
function createListContent(items as Object) as Object content = createObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") for each item in items node = createObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") node.title = item.title node.description = item.description content.appendChild(node) end for return content end function
function handleVideoStateChange(state as String) as void if state = "error" showError("Video playback error") else if state = "finished" m.videoPlayer.visible = false m.contentLabel.visible = true end if end function
function showError(message as String) as void m.contentLabel.text = "Error: " + message m.contentLabel.visible = true m.videoPlayer.visible = false m.isLoading.value = false m.loadingLabel.visible = false end function
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if not press then return false if key = "left" m.showBookmarks = not m.showBookmarks m.bookmarksList.visible = m.showBookmarks if m.showBookmarks m.bookmarksList.setFocus(true) end if return true else if key = "right" m.currentInput = "" return true else if key = "OK" if m.videoPlayer.visible and m.videoPlayer.hasFocus() if m.videoPlayer.paused m.videoPlayer.control = "play" else m.videoPlayer.control = "pause" end if end if return true else if key = "up" if m.showBookmarks and m.bookmarksList.hasFocus() m.bookmarksList.moveUp() return true end if else if key = "down" if m.showBookmarks and m.bookmarksList.hasFocus() m.bookmarksList.moveDown() return true end if end if return false end function
